svg.title: OpenClaw skills loading — build time vs runtime vs host volume
svg.desc: Two-column diagram showing build-time seeding on the left and runtime skill loading on the right, with arrows showing how skills flow into the container and then into the agent.

g.text: cp -rn seed → live dir • jq merge lock

svg.text: OpenClaw scans ~/.openclaw/skills automatically — clawhub lock.json only affects
clawhub list output, not skill loading. If your host volume already has the skills,
the entire seed mechanism is operationally redundant for day-to-day use.
